title: Christmas Ribbons, 5 Rolls Christmas Grosgrain Ribbons Bundle, Xmas Ribbon of 5 Patterns Double Faced Satin Polyester Xmas Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Wedding, Party (5m/Roll, Width 10mm)
features: 【Christmas-themed Ribbon】5 kinds of exquisite Christmas ribbons, with Christmas tree, snowflakes and "Merry Christmas" logo, used for bows, gift packaging, easy to bend. The cylindrical Christmas ribbon is more convenient to store and use.

【Easy To Use】 You only need to cut the ribbons and you can use Christmas ribbons to wrap gift boxes or fold into bows to decorate your Christmas tree. And the Christmas elements will add Christmas atmosphere to you and your family and friends.

【Christmas Ribbon Details】5 rolls of Christmas ribbons are composed of 5 kinds of Christmas elements. The length of each roll of Christmas ribbon is 5 meters and the width is 1 cm. Multi-element patterns can meet your different matching needs.
【Widely used】 It can be used for Christmas gift packaging, card making, party supplies, bows, packaging design, Christmas trees, it is very suitable for Christmas themes.

【After-sales Service】Not only will you get 5 rolls of Christmas ribbons totaling 25 meters, you will also get the support of a group——If you have any problems with our Xmas ribbons, please feel free to contact us, we will always be there for you.
description: Christmas Ribbon Set 5 Roll Christmas Grosgrain Ribbons Bundle, Xmas Theme Ribbon of 5 Patterns Double Faced Polyester Christmas Satin Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Wedding, Party Specification of the Christmas Ribbon ✅ Material: Polyester ✅ Width: approx. 1 cm / 0.4"" ✅ Length: approx. 5 meter / 197"" ✅ Pattern: Colorful Xmas theme ✅ Quantity: 5 ✅ Weight: 73 grams Features: Made of polyester fabric, tenacious and not easy to break Bright and colorful Easy to use Package includes: 5 x Christmas Grosgrain Ribbons
